summary: The incident involved a targeted spear-phishing attack against the CFO of M57.Biz. The attacker spoofed the President's email address (alison@m57.biz) and manipulated the Reply-To header to redirect sensitive employee data to an external Gmail account (tuckergorge@gmail.com). The Return-Path (simsong@xy.dreamhostps.com) indicates the relay infrastructure used for the spoofed message. The attack successfully resulted in the exfiltration of unencrypted confidential documents containing SSNs and salary information.
null_hypothesis: The null hypothesis is that the email exchange was a legitimate business request from the President. This is refuted by the forensic evidence: the Return-Path (simsong@xy.dreamhostps.com) does not match the From address, and the Reply-To header was explicitly altered to an external, non-corporate address.

artifacts.name: Victim Email
artifacts.description: Targeted CFO account used to receive the phishing email.
artifacts.recommended_validation: Review mailbox access logs for unauthorized logins.

artifacts.name: Spoofed Actor Email
artifacts.description: Spoofed identity of the company President used to deceive the CFO.
artifacts.recommended_validation: Verify email headers for SPF/DKIM/DMARC failures.

artifacts.name: Exfiltration Destination
artifacts.description: External email address used as the Reply-To target for data exfiltration.
artifacts.recommended_validation: Block domain/address and investigate associated activity.

artifacts.name: Malicious Return-Path
artifacts.description: Return-Path indicating the relay infrastructure used for the spoofed email.

artifacts.name: Exfiltrated Data File
artifacts.description: Unencrypted file created on Desktop and sent to attacker.
artifacts.recommended_validation: Audit file access logs and DLP alerts.
